caption: A presentation takes place in a room with red walls, wood-paneled accents, and a rows of chairs occupied by an audience. A man in a blue button-down shirt stands at a podium at the front of the room, addressing a seated group of people. Among the audience members are individuals wearing a red and blue jacket, a yellow shirt, and a grey shirt. A person standing to the right of the speaker appears to be adjusting a camera or recording device. A black screen and various framed documents are mounted on the red wall. The text "ORCA" is visible as a white logo in the lower right area of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the camera angle shifts from a wide shot of the entire room to a closer view of the speaker and the front rows of the audience, focusing more on the man at the podium and the people nearby.
